ogTitle: Central Tilba vs Chaelundi: Climate Safety

heading: Central Tilba vs Chaelundi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Central Tilba, New South Wales and Chaelundi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Central Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Chaelundi (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Central Tilba or Chaelundi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Central Tilba has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Chaelundi scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Central Tilba scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Chaelundi scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Central Tilba or Chaelundi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Central Tilba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
